Home / Services / House Washing

House Washing

Revitalize your home's exterior with our thorough house washing services.

Fresno's intense summer heat and dusty conditions can take a toll on your home's exterior. Over time, dirt, algae, and mildew can accumulate, diminishing your curb appeal and potentially causing damage. Our house washing service is designed to safely and effectively remove these contaminants, restoring your home to its original beauty.

We use a soft washing technique that combines low-pressure water with specialized cleaning solutions. This method is gentle on your siding, preventing damage while still delivering a powerful clean. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that every nook and cranny is thoroughly cleaned, from the siding to the trim to the gutters.

Our house washing service not only improves the appearance of your home but also helps to protect it from the damaging effects of mold, mildew, and algae. Regular house washing can extend the life of your siding and prevent costly repairs down the road. We handle all types of siding, including stucco common in Fresno, vinyl, wood, and brick.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Thorough inspection of your home's exterior to identify areas of concern.
  2. 02 Step 2: Application of our specialized cleaning solution to loosen dirt and grime.
  3. 03 Step 3: Gentle rinsing with low-pressure water to remove contaminants without damaging surfaces.
  4. 04 Step 4: Final inspection to ensure complete satisfaction.

Benefits

  • Improved curb appeal
  • Protection against mold and mildew
  • Extended siding lifespan
  • Increased property value

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I have my house washed?

We recommend having your house washed every 1-2 years to maintain its appearance and protect it from damage. Homes near Woodward Park or in older neighborhoods may see increased buildup.

Is soft washing safe for my siding?

Yes, soft washing is a safe and effective method for cleaning all types of siding. It uses low pressure to prevent damage while still delivering a powerful clean.

Do I need to be home during the house washing service?

No, you do not need to be home during the service. We just need access to an outdoor water spigot.
